sections.paragraph:
Original: קסם

Transliteration: qesem

Phonetic: keh'-sem

BDB Definition:

  1. divination, witchcraft
    1. of the nations, Balaam
    2. of false prophets
    3. in a good sense (king's lips as oracles)

Origin: from H7080

TWOT entry: 2044a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
